title: Cuneiform Tablet #0821: Hellenistic Letter
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Hellenistic period — a letter document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Hellenistic period — a letter document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Hellenistic period. Letter document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records letter matters typical of Hellenistic period administrative or literary practice.
